string.name: innerConflict
string.value: ={{ $json.characters[0].name }} struggles between academic integrity and the temptation to fake evidence to prove their theories.

string.name: defenseMechanism
string.value: Rationalization - {{ $json.characters[0].name }} justifies questionable research methods by focusing on the greater good of discovery.

string.name: geography
string.value: Remote archaeological dig site in mountainous region, nearby small village with limited resources, university campus in major city

string.name: environment
string.value: Harsh weather conditions at dig site, contrast between dusty field conditions and sterile academic environments

string.name: history
string.value: Ancient civilization flourished 3000-2000 BCE, collapsed mysteriously, site rediscovered in 1920s, major excavations in 1950s-60s, current project is first using new technology

string.name: politics
string.value: Local government eager for tourism from archaeological discoveries, university politics affecting funding, tensions between academic institutions

string.name: economics
string.value: Limited grant funding creating competition, local economy becoming dependent on archaeological tourism

string.name: religion
string.value: Local spiritual beliefs about ancestral sites, academic secular approach creating occasional conflicts with local religious leaders

string.name: semiotics
string.value: Dust and dirt represent uncovered truth, height (mountains, university tower) represents academic ambition and achievement

string.name: symbolTools
string.value: Archaeological tools as metaphors for discovery process - trowels for careful precision, brushes for gentle revealing of truth
